title: canthium henriquesianum
intro: Canthium henriquesianum, also known as the Red Bead Tree, is a species of flowering plant in the family Rubiaceae. It is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its leaves, which are used to treat various health conditions such as fever, rheumatism, and skin infections. The plant's health benefits include its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which help to reduce inflammation and prevent the growth of microorganisms. In traditional medicine, the leaves are often prepared as a decoction, infusion, or tincture to treat various ailments, showcasing its versatility in herbal preparations.
